channel.title: 2019 on VHDL News
channel.description: Recent content in 2019 on VHDL News

item.title: VHDLproc - VHDL preprocessor following VHDL-2019 directives
item.description: I recently worked on rewriting this from scratch to go from C-style directives to VHDL-2019 directives, and it was a lot of fun. A bonus is now it is available as both a commandline and python library, and available on pip.
